title: Domain Kwaad
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
'''Domain Kwaad''' was a [[Domain]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shaper caste]].

==Overview==
This Domain was one of the most skilled Domains of the Shaper caste. However, the Domain was cursed with several heretics. It also appeared to control [[Domain Yim]].

Another particular note about the Domain was that an individual was not allowed to touch a member of Domain's Kwaad's head. The phrase "Veka, Kwaad" was used as a code to gain access to the shaping facilities used by the domain.

==History==
Domain Kwaad's most infamous member was [[Mezhan Kwaad]], who had an affair with a member of the [[Warrior caste]], violated Shaping protocols when she tried to reshape [[Tahiri Veila]] into a [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and openly declared that the [[True Way|Gods]] did not exist. [[Tahiri Veila|Riina Kwaad]] was the personality shaped into Tahiri Veila.

Another member of the Domain was [[Qelah Kwaad]], who was placed in charge of the [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] of [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]] after [[Nen Yim]] (Mezhan's apprentice) disappeared.

==Behind the scenes==
''Kwaad'' is [[Wikipedia:Dutch language|Dutch]] for evil or angry.
